description_long: This is a female adult figure dressed in a knee-length, buttoned lab coat with a collared shirt visible at the neckline. The figure stands upright with arms extended horizontally, suggesting a neutral or T-pose. The coat is fitted and has long sleeves, and the figure wears simple, closed-toe shoes. The hair is straight, cut to about shoulder length, and neatly styled. No accessories, jewelry, or carried objects are visible. The overall appearance is professional, likely representing a scientist, doctor, or medical professional in an urban or institutional setting.
description: A female adult in a fitted lab coat and closed-toe shoes, standing upright with arms outstretched, and shoulder-length straight hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, buttoned lab coat, collared shirt, and both arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the straight fall of the coat, and the side of the shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the straight cut of the coat, and both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the coat's side seam, and the side of the shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: knee-length buttoned lab coat with collared shirt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
